              <activity role='clinicians' action='refer patient to a dietitian within 7 days of admission for recommendations' objects='dietitian referral' id='activity14'/>
              <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway3'>
                <branch condition='patient is unable to meet nutritional and fluid requirements' id='branch7'>
                  <activity role='dietitian' action='recommend and consider enteral nutrition support' objects='enteral nutrition support' id='activity15'/>
                </branch>
                <branch condition='patient is able to meet nutritional and fluid requirements' id='branch8'>
                  <activity role='dietitian' action='provide nutrition and hydration recommendations' objects='nutrition recommendations,hydration recommendations' id='activity16'/>
                </branch>
              </exclusiveGateway>
            </branch>
            <branch condition='no nutritional concerns hydration deficits dysphagia or other comorbidities are identified' id='branch9'>
              <activity role='clinicians' action='continue routine nutrition and hydration monitoring' objects='nutrition status,hydration status' id='activity17'/>
            </branch>
          </exclusiveGateway>
        </branch>
        <branch id='branch10'>
          <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway4a'>
            <branch condition='mobilization is contraindicated' id='branch10_1'>
              <activity role='stroke unit team' action='defer mobilization and document contraindications while continuing other preventive care' objects='contraindications documentation,preventive care plan' id='activity20'/>
            </branch>
            <branch condition='mobilization is not contraindicated' id='branch10_2'>
              <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway4b'>
                <branch condition='within 24 hours of stroke onset' id='branch10_2_1'>
                  <activity role='stroke unit team' action='avoid frequent out-of-bed activity and use clinical judgement to determine whether limited very early mobilization is reasonable' objects='mobilization decision' id='activity19'/>
                </branch>
                <branch condition='24 to 48 hours from stroke onset' id='branch10_2_2'>
                  <activity role='stroke unit team' action='mobilize patient early between 24 hours and 48 hours of stroke onset' objects='early mobilization plan' id='activity18'/>
                </branch>
                <branch condition='more than 48 hours from stroke onset' id='branch10_2_3'>
                  <activity role='stroke unit team' action='mobilize patient as soon as clinically feasible and document that the early mobilization window has passed' objects='mobilization plan,clinical documentation' id='activity18_2'/>
                </branch>
              </exclusiveGateway>
            </branch>
          </exclusiveGateway>
        </branch>
      </parallelGateway>
    </branch>
    <branch condition='patient has TIA or minor nondisabling stroke' id='branch14'>
      <activity role='acute care team' action='recognize that module 3a acute care treatment recommendations are not applicable' objects='TIA or minor nondisabling stroke status' id='activity21'/>
      <activity role='acute care team' action='forward assessment results and arrange follow-up with the TIA clinic or outpatient pathway' objects='ED screening results,follow-up plan' id='activity22'/>
    </branch>
  </exclusiveGateway>
  <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway5'>
    <branch condition='patient is admitted to in-hospital rehabilitation' id='branch15'>
      <activity role='acute care team' action='complete appropriate cross-continuum secondary prevention assessment' objects='Modules 5 and 10 secondary prevention assessment needs' id='activity23_1'/>
      <activity role='acute care team' action='initiate and communicate secondary prevention therapies and referrals' objects='Modules 5 and 10 secondary prevention therapies,referrals,care transition information' id='activity23_2'/>
    </branch>
    <branch condition='patient is discharged from acute care' id='branch16'>
      <activity role='acute care team' action='complete appropriate cross-continuum secondary prevention assessment' objects='Modules 5 and 10 secondary prevention assessment needs' id='activity24_1'/>
      <activity role='acute care team' action='initiate and communicate secondary prevention therapies and referrals' objects='Modules 5 and 10 secondary prevention therapies,referrals,discharge information' id='activity24_2'/>
    </branch>
  </exclusiveGateway>
</process>)</API>
